channel.title: Drama on Mr. Pointing
channel.description: Recent content in Drama on Mr. Pointing

item.title: The Idiot
item.description: One of the first books I had to write about before finishing it. I’m on the last 50 pages, but it’s taken me almost two months to finish it. I will finish it today, but can’t say I’m in a rush. I thoroughly enjoyed this book, so much to say that even the boring parts were great. I’ve never cared so much about petty melodrama than before. The way Dostoyevsky writes makes the buffoonery these characters exemplify worth the endeavor.
